keyTerms.defect escape rate: The number of defective units that reach the customer, measured in parts per million — a key quality metric
keyTerms.transformer architecture: The deep-learning model design originally developed for language processing, now adapted for pixel-level visual inspection
keyTerms.zero-shot defect detection: The ability of AI inspection systems to identify anomalies they were never explicitly trained to recognize
keyTerms.Foxconn Longhua: Foxconn's flagship manufacturing campus in Shenzhen, a major site of AI-driven automation deployment
keyTerms.grindhouse cinema: Urban theaters in 1970s America that screened low-budget martial arts and exploitation films, introducing kung fu to Western audiences
